channel.title: PlayStation 5 Consoles, Games & Accessories on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux
channel.description: Recent content in PlayStation 5 Consoles, Games & Accessories on LEGO barato - Cheap - Angebote - Cadeaux

item.title: LEGO 76957 Jurassic Park Velociraptor Escape Dinosaur Toy for Boys Girls Kids Aged 4 and Up Set with Dino Figure Off-Road Car and 2 Minifigures
item.description: You can find LEGO 76957 Jurassic Park Velociraptor Escape Dinosaur Toy for Boys Girls Kids Aged 4 and Up Set with Dino Figure Off-Road Car and 2 Minifigures with a discount here: ℹ️: This Jurassic Park dinosaur toy for boys, girls and kids 4+ includes walkie-talkie, tranquilizer, hot dog, dinosaur poop and dino egg in a nest Simple pictorial instructions in the box are perfect for kids who are only just learning to read; for digital fun, check out the LEGO Builder app Features a tower with a Starter Brick base, a winch with a feeding basket, a gate for the toy buggy car and a fence with a breakout function The set includes a cool, posable velociraptor dinosaur toy figure, plus 2 minifigures: Dr Ellie Sattler and Robert Muldoon, and a frog figure This LEGO Jurassic Park Velociraptor Escape set for kids aged 4+ includes velociraptor figure, quick-build dinosaur pen and a jeep car toy LEGO Jurassic Park 4+ building sets are designed to introduce kids to dinosaur toys, helping them learn to build and develop their imaginations This jurassic world collection set is designed for young children; models can be build with just a bit of assistance from a parent or older sibling 🛒 Buy it!
